message: 我已经把实现路线定住了：这轮不改训练主路径，而是新加一个独立的 packet exporter，直接复用 frozen teacher adapter 去读取原视频和重建视频，再导出 `pred_feat/target_feat` 和 temporal delta。这样一来，第一轮验证会更干净，能更直接回答“feature packet 会不会比 reconstructed-video 更适合作为 machine-facing 接口”。

guidance_vm.summary: Artifact recorded. Continue from the latest durable quest state.

complete_when: The next substantive result is written durably.
